{{CargoRelic
|name=Das Rheingold
|class_id=22080
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=03-19
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Mar 19, 513 BC, the dwarf Alberich took advantage of the absence of the guardian fairy and stole the Rheingold.<br>At the bottom of the Rhine, Das Rheingold rests on a boulder guarded by three fairies. This magical gold possesses the power to grant its owner the ability to rule the world if it is crafted into a ring, but in exchange, the holder must forsake love. After being ridiculed for his unrequited love for a fairy, Alberich, a dwarf Nibelungen, cursed love and stole the gold to craft the ring. This act set off a tragic chain of events that would have a profound impact on the world.
|fame=34
|art=26
|fth=27
|civ=47
|tech=20
|ss1=Dragon Minion HP +1%
|ss2=Dragon Minion HP +2%
|ss3=Dragon Minion HP +3%
|ss4=Dragon Minion HP +5%
|ss7=Dragon Minion HP +5%<br>Dragon Minion HP +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill I.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Fire DMG +20
}}
